title: +Fire
description: New torch! Fire has become more vibrant and dynamic thanks to extended animations that produce smoother, heavier flames.
body:
This small but meticulously crafted resource pack radically changes the visual appearance of torches, bringing a new sense of atmosphere and realism to the game.
In addition to the static model, their animation has also been completely reworked. The fire has become more vibrant and dynamic thanks to an elongated animation, conveying smoother, heavier flames. The flames themselves have become darker and more saturated, casting deeper, more dramatic shadows, filling the space with a mysterious, shimmering light. This small change has a huge impact on the overall atmosphere: dark dungeons and caves become truly eerie. Overall, this is a simple addition.
